title: Rockstar reveals GTA 6 cover art and opens pre-orders for June 25
summary: The company confirms the pre-order date and shows the official cover, generating global reactions and political parodies.

title: Steam Controller demand forces Valve to delay shipments until 2027
summary: Valve adjusts controller reservations and confirms that new orders will not be delivered until after New Year, affecting thousands of users.

title: Valve releases SteamOS 3.8 with initial support for new Steam Machines
summary: The update includes visual improvements, faster patches, and sets the stage for the return of Steam hardware.

title: Epic Games will rebuild its PC launcher from scratch to make it five times faster
summary: The company announces a complete overhaul of the store, copying Steam features and promising much higher performance.

title: Sony changes its strategy for PC exclusive releases due to lack of revenue
summary: Reports indicate that PlayStation adjusts its approach to PC after disappointing financial results, although it does not officially confirm it.

title: Epic Games presents Unreal Engine 6 focused on generative AI, causing concern among developers
summary: The announcement leads studios like Vampire Survivors to reconsider their collaborations with Epic due to its stance on artificial intelligence.

title: Rockstar shows new nighttime images of GTA 6 and a Vice City clip
summary: The company releases a spectacular night scene by the water and a clip revealing more details of the anticipated open world.

title: Activision confirms that the re-releases of Black Ops 1 and 2 on PlayStation are not remasters
summary: The company clarifies that the titles arrive without significant graphical improvements, moderating player expectations.

title: Jim Carrey to return as The Grinch in a sequel 25 years after the original
summary: 'The Grinch 2: Saving Christmas' is officially announced for multiple platforms, with Carrey reprising his iconic role.

title: System Shock remake was completed thanks to a small group of developers after running out of funds
summary: The co-director reveals they took a risky step to finish the game after the project ran out of money halfway through.

title: Dave the Diver receives downloadable content in the jungle and a live-action short film
summary: The director of Sharknado directs a live-action short of the popular game, which also releases a DLC with new rewards.

title: MSI announces a $1,800 gaming handheld and warns it will be a tough year for players
summary: The company presents its new portable console with a high price and acknowledges that the market will face economic difficulties.

title: Palworld developer takes a stance against the use of AI in video games
summary: The studio states that players do not want artificial intelligence and defends human creativity against generative tools.

title: Shinobi: Art of Vengeance will arrive on Switch 2 on September 24
summary: The new installment of the classic action franchise will launch on Nintendo's console with a confirmed date.

title: Digimon Story: Time Stranger receives a free update with new features
summary: The patch adds a Terriermon assistant, graphics mode options, and will be available alongside the Switch versions.

title: Pragmata: development team included a group of women to capture childhood innocence and release patch
summary: It is revealed that the game had advisors to represent the protagonist, while an update fixes the most difficult section.

title: Pokémon Pokopia updated to version 1.1.1 with patches and improvements
summary: The game receives a new update that fixes bugs and adds content, according to the official patch notes.

title: World of Warcraft announces major patch 12.1 and Discord integration in clans
summary: Blizzard prepares a huge update with new content and will allow players to communicate via Discord without leaving the game.

title: Warframe: build guides, new mission, and studio statements on romance
summary: The game receives varied content: from character tutorials to a new Railjack mission and comments on Protoframe fatigue.

title: Capcom: a mod enables co-op in Resident Evil 4 Remake and a new fighter arrives in Street Fighter 6
summary: The community creates a highly anticipated mod while Capcom adds Yasmine, the first Filipino fighter, to the SF6 roster.
